steps.title: Spot the structural contrast
steps.content: The passage uses “on the other hand” to contrast two strategies for Indigenous political representation: working within established parties (US approach) versus forming independent parties (Canada and Latin America approach).

steps.title: Match the purpose to the correct choice
steps.content: Choice C directly captures the purpose: highlighting two approaches to Indigenous representation. The others claim the passage traces history, makes an argument, or documents influence—none of which occurs. That matches choice C — C is correct.
